title: Immunostaining of iPSC-derived neurons for quantification of synaptic proteins
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"upra","text":"Here, we fix, permeabilize, and stain human iPSC-derived neurons for the purpose of observing and quantifying somal proteins of interest. For preceding culture of neurons, see \"Protocol: Culture and transfection of iPSC-derived neurons for live-imaging of axonal cargoes.\"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"3ul1f","text":"35 mm imaging dish, 20 mm glass diameter (Mattek, p35g-1-5-20-c)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ieqa","text":"18mm circular coverglass (Electron Microscopy Sciences, Cat# 72222-01)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5kkg1","text":"Prolong Gold Antifade Mountant (Thermo Fisher, P36930)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: At DIV14, fix human iNeurons in 4% paraformaldehyde supplemented with 4% sucrose for 15 minutes at 37 degrees C
Permeabilize for 15 minutes in 0.2% Triton-X in PBS
Block for 1 hour with 5% goat serum and 1% BSA in PBS
Incubate in primary antibody diluted in blocking solution at room termperature for 1 hour
Incubate in secondary antibody diluted in blocking solution for 1 hour at room temperature
Remove PBS and add 40 µL Prolong Gold (Thermo Fisher). Using forceps, apply coverglass.
creator: Dan Dou
